---
title: "CombingingData"
format: html
---
```{r, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
# Democracy data
democracy_data<-readr::read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/main/data/2024/2024-11-05/democracy_data.csv')
# GDP data
gdpData <- read.csv("Country_GDP.csv")

# Employment data
employData<-read.csv("employ2.csv")

#Combining the two data sets found through API's
combined <- left_join(
  gdpData,
  employData,
  by = c("year", "country"),
  relationship = "many-to-many"
)
# Combining with orginal democracy_data 
masterSet<-left_join(democracy_data, combined, by=c('country_code','year'))

write_csv(masterSet,file="masterSet.csv")

```
